bility of ours can be ascribed
to our successful portfolio of businesses, geographies and products.
manufacturing services supported with highly qualified technical team we attempt to build blocks to produce an organization that manufactures therapeutics for a range of diseases.
Consistent growth and sustainability is a multidimensiona

, we remained focused on providing quality and affordable medicines to billions of ailing patients across geographies and bridging the gap of unmet needs of medical fraternity through continuous innovation. Our basic business philosophy, by its very nature, serves a social responsibility hence we have a far better reason than profits alone to drive our performance.
Sustainability, is not a trend we blindly follow, it is intrinsic to how we have operated since the genesis of the organiz

is focused on increasing the momentum in the business through organic growth routes. Growth is well spread across geographies with focus on key therapeutics segments. We continue to evaluate various therapy areas to strengthen its business and competitivene

has forayed into high growth potential segments like Cardiovascular, Diabetes, Orthopedics, Gynecology, Respiratory and Oncology. These new growth areas will add significant depth to the existing product pipeline.
business has witnessed exemplary growth over the past few years growing ahead of the Indian
Market as well as International market
at St George Hospital . He was President at ENT association of India , Mumbai Branch

Our mission is to Serve Global Healthcare needs through Empathy, Innovation and Technology. We believe that to ensure sustained growth, we need to clearly understand our customer's needs and use cutting edge technology to present innovative solutions

Our mission is to Serve Global Healthcare needs through Empathy, Innovation and Technology. We believe that to ensure sustained growth, we need to clearly understand our customer's needs and use cutting edge technology to present innovative solutions
Lead the way to bring Wellness and Healthcare to the

into a vertically integrated, globally active Business, leading and developing Special and Effective Wellness and Healthcare Products with a special emphasis on Consumer safety to suit their unique needs in today’s exciting world.
Evolve as an Organization setting Leadership Benchmarks for Innovation, Excellence, Growth, Employee satisfaction, Products Safety & Value Creation.

, we believe in the art of first creating opportunities and then optimizing them to the fullest. In this manner, we identify the unmet medical needs across therapies in different markets and capitalize on them to optimum levels ahead of competition.
are trusting on our medicines and we take that responsibility w
dedicated to ensuring our medicines are readily available for healthcare professionals and in turn the ultimate patients.
All of our associated sites follow Good Manufacturing Practice ensuring the highest quality and safety for the end user.
In our constant Endeavour to deliver highest quality products, we have put in place strong and effective Quality Control and Quality Assurance Systems which consist of:
Modern, sophisticated and advanced instrumentation and equipment
We manage proprietary and sensitive customer specific information professionally to maintain mutual trust and confidence. We assure our
a totally trustworthy partner who can be relied upon to professionally manage and safeguard confidential matters like Product Development, Processes, R & D, etc.
an excellent Team of Senior and experienced Professionals to manage
professionally. We firmly believe that our Team will be a key differentiator in this competitive business environment.

is an established name in Indian Pharmaceutical
operates its International business through various business models like Private Markets, Tenders, Licensing, Contract manufacturing and Joint Ventures.
has successfully leveraged its production and Research & development competency for supplying affordable quality pharmaceuticals across the globe.

Intellectual property Management cell ( IPMC) Capabilities
IR (Immediate Release) cores and coated tablets (Film, Enteric and Sugar coated)
MR (Modified Release) cores and coated tablets (Film, Enteric and Sugar coated)

Lab formula development and development for stability & validation

We trust in offering finest quality yet cost effective solutions to our business partners based on completely integrated R&D, technology and engineering capabilities. We have built robust alliances and continuing relationships with top global generic companies to offer R&D and formulation development services. With a view to provide best facilities to the customer, our selection process for the plant is systematic and major stress is given on capacities and vertical integration. Standards of highest value are strictly followed for manufacturing and distribution. A well-documented procedure exists to ensure transparency, traceability of every batch manufacturing.

The selection of our manufacturing partner is based on our experience for the past several years and with the current and planned capacity utilization. Compliance with Good Distribution practices adds an advantage to control supply chain issues.
We offer the following product forms for formulation development:
Immediate release tablets, hard gelatine capsules
Parenteral (Small volume parenteral, Dry powder and Lyophilized)

We select the best suited manufacturing facility and take responsibility to supply products as well as documentation as required by various authorities for variation of finished product manufacturing site or Active Ingredient.
Current facilities where products can be manufactured are listed here.
Beta lactam: Tablets, Capsules, Powder for Suspension/ syrup
WHO GMP, UKMHRA, EU GMP USFDA
Tablets, Capsules, Oral Solution, Soft Gel Capsules
Oncology: Tablets, Capsules, Injectable, lyophilized injection
We are in position to manufacture special products where special lines are required for manufacturing due to colour or any other factor influencing the product.

Cost efficiency is a core focus area for us and we have implemented various systems to ensure competitiveness.
We provide Logistics support to ensure that delivery of our products reaches customers in the shortest possible time, in a safe and correct storage condition and at a competitive cost.
Time management and prompt response time is our core business focus.
environment for our personnel and safety of products is ensured at every step of our operation.
